name: io.github.bbajt/codemap-mcp
title: CodeMap
description: Roslyn-powered semantic code index for C# codebases. Lets AI agents query symbols, call graphs, type hierarchies, and architectural facts instead of brute-reading source files. 90%+ average token savings.

environmentVariables.name: CODEMAP_CACHE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Path to a shared baseline cache directory. When set, index.ensure_baseline checks the cache before running a full Roslyn build — useful on CI or shared machines.
